m_26_14.description: JIT access daily auditor (Element 5 L4): runs daily at 13:00 UTC, inventories all status=active grants in m_26_14-jit-grants, and appends a daily report document to m_26_14-jit-audit-reports flagging any grant active longer than 72 hours. Long-running grants violate the just-in-time principle — review and revoke or re-justify them. Pair with a detection rule or connector on the report index for ISSO notification. Deploy via scripts/deploy.py which substitutes __ES_HOST__/__KIBANA_HOST__/__AUTH_HEADER__ tokens.

script.source: long staleMs = ((Number) ctx.metadata['stale_after_hours']).longValue() * 3600000L; long nowMs = ctx.execution_time.toInstant().toEpochMilli(); def active = []; def stale = []; for (def h : ctx.payload.hits.hits) { def src = h['_source']; def rec = ['grant_id': src['grant_id'], 'username': src['username'], 'role': src['role'], 'case_id': src['case_id'], 'granted_by': src['granted_by'], 'granted_at': src['granted_at'], 'expires_at': src['expires_at']]; active.add(rec); if (src['granted_at'] != null) { long grantedMs = ZonedDateTime.parse(src['granted_at'].toString()).toInstant().toEpochMilli(); if (nowMs - grantedMs > staleMs) { stale.add(rec); } } } StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(); for (def s : stale) { sb.append('- ').append(s['username']).append(' role=').append(s['role']).append(' since ').append(s['granted_at']).append(' '); } return ['@timestamp': ctx.execution_time, 'report': 'm_26_14-jit-daily-audit', 'active_count': active.size(), 'stale_count': stale.size(), 'active_grants': active, 'stale_grants': stale, 'stale_summary': sb.toString(), 'watcher_id': ctx.metadata['watcher_id']];
